overview.description: The Innovator 2 Yr to April 2027 (TAPR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to track the return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), to a cap, with 100% downside hedge over a two-year outcome period. The actively managed fund holds FLEX options to obtain exposure TAPR was launched on Mar 31, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.
